metadata.business_purpose: Stores additional information or comments related to a document or data item.
metadata.primary_entity: An annotation record.

metadata.business_purpose: Tracks formal requests to modify the current state of an asset, process, or system.
metadata.primary_entity: A change request.

metadata.business_purpose: Records items that need to be verified or completed as part of a process or task.
metadata.primary_entity: A checklist item.

metadata.business_purpose: Tracks the templates for checklists used in various processes such as audits and reviews.
metadata.primary_entity: A checklist template

metadata.business_purpose: Stores notes or remarks made by individuals about documents, projects, or other matters.
metadata.primary_entity: A comment

metadata.business_purpose: Records detailed information about counterparties, including their identities and financial data.
metadata.primary_entity: A counterparty's details

metadata.business_purpose: Stores additional information and contact details for counterparties involved in financial transactions.
metadata.primary_entity: A counterparty's supplementary information including name, type of business, contact details, etc.

metadata.business_purpose: Defines items that can be displayed on dashboards for monitoring and reporting purposes.
metadata.primary_entity: An item or component of a dashboard, including its type, key, title, and description.

metadata.business_purpose: Holds information about dashboards used for monitoring and reporting in various systems.
metadata.primary_entity: A dashboard, which is a collection of items designed for specific monitoring or reporting needs.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores categories for documents to organize and manage them.
metadata.primary_entity: Category of a document

metadata.business_purpose: Tracks the ingestion process for documents, including when and where they were ingested.
metadata.primary_entity: Record of a document ingestion event

metadata.business_purpose: Maps documents to their associated tags for categorization and searchability.
metadata.primary_entity: Mapping between a document and its tag

metadata.business_purpose: Stores tags associated with documents for categorization and filtering purposes.
metadata.primary_entity: Tag

metadata.business_purpose: Defines the types of documents, including their characteristics and associated metadata.
metadata.primary_entity: Document Type

metadata.business_purpose: Tracks detailed information about each document, including its creation and update history.
metadata.primary_entity: Document

metadata.business_purpose: Stores information about external users who can access the system.
metadata.primary_entity: An external user of the system.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores information about features or modules available in the system.
metadata.primary_entity: A feature or module within the system.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores information about groups, which may be used for role-based access control or other purposes.
metadata.primary_entity: A group of users or entities within the system.

metadata.business_purpose: To track and manage the lifecycle of incidents, including their status, reason, investigation details, and resolution.
metadata.primary_entity: An incident record in the system.

metadata.business_purpose: To store and analyze the signal scores related to incidents, including scores for different types of signals.
metadata.primary_entity: A record of signal scores for an incident.

metadata.business_purpose: To track and manage the investigation details for counter-parties, including their status, owned by, and investigation date.
metadata.primary_entity: An investigation record for a counter-party.

metadata.business_purpose: To store and manage different levels of data or processes in the system.
metadata.primary_entity: A level within the system with a display name and description.

metadata.business_purpose: To store predictions made by machine learning models, including results and metadata.
metadata.primary_entity: A single prediction made by a machine learning model.

metadata.business_purpose: To store different use cases for machine learning models and their associated metadata.
metadata.primary_entity: A specific use case for a machine learning model with details like name and description.

metadata.business_purpose: The module table stores information about different functionalities or sections within a system.
metadata.primary_entity: A module or functionality of the system.

metadata.business_purpose: The notification table records events and actions that require some form of communication or alerting.
metadata.primary_entity: A notification event or action.

metadata.business_purpose: The organizations table stores information about different entities or groups within an organization.
metadata.primary_entity: An organization or entity.

metadata.business_purpose: Records information related to various types of research conducted by parties.
metadata.primary_entity: A specific piece of research conducted by a party.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores details about password policies, including their approval status and associated notes.
metadata.primary_entity: A password policy.

metadata.business_purpose: Defines the rules and values associated with each password policy, indicating whether they are active.
metadata.primary_entity: A specific rule within a password policy.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores security questions and their answers for user authentication purposes.
metadata.primary_entity: A security question with its example answers.

metadata.business_purpose: Defines the permissions available within the system, which can be assigned to users or roles.
metadata.primary_entity: A permission with its code and description.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores different types of research that can be conducted within the system.
metadata.primary_entity: A type of research.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores comments and annotations related to RFI (Request for Information) instances.
metadata.primary_entity: A single comment or annotation associated with an RFI instance.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores questions and additional information related to RFI instances for support documentation.
metadata.primary_entity: A single question or piece of additional information associated with an RFI instance.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores the state and metadata of RFI instances throughout their lifecycle.
metadata.primary_entity: An RFI instance with its current state and related information.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores information about the questions related to Request for Information (RFI) processes.
metadata.primary_entity: A single question in an RFI process.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores the responses provided for questions in Request for Information (RFI) processes.
metadata.primary_entity: A single response to a question in an RFI process.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores pre-defined templates for Request for Information (RFI) processes, including their details and configurations.
metadata.primary_entity: A single template used for creating RFI processes.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores information about different roles within an organization.
metadata.primary_entity: Role in the organization

metadata.business_purpose: Links roles to specific permissions, defining what actions can be performed by each role.
metadata.primary_entity: Relationship between a role and its permissions

metadata.business_purpose: Defines rules or policies that need to be adhered to, such as compliance rules or risk management guidelines.
metadata.primary_entity: Rule or policy

metadata.business_purpose: Tracks the process of data sampling for various compliance and risk management activities.
metadata.primary_entity: A single instance of a data sampling activity.

metadata.business_purpose: Records the assignments of signals to various entities for risk management and fraud detection purposes.
metadata.primary_entity: A single signal assignment record.

metadata.business_purpose: Defines the categories into which signals can be classified for easier management and analysis.
metadata.primary_entity: A category of signals.

metadata.business_purpose: Defines the levels of signals that can be used in various compliance and risk management processes.
metadata.primary_entity: A level or category of a signal used in specific tables.

metadata.business_purpose: Contains the rules and logic that define how signals are processed, evaluated, and scored within various compliance and risk management processes.
metadata.primary_entity: A rule or set of instructions for processing a signal.

metadata.business_purpose: Records the scores and weights assigned to signals, reflecting their impact in various compliance and risk management processes.
metadata.primary_entity: A record of a signal's score and weight assignment.

metadata.business_purpose: Defines the types of signals used in various workflows.
metadata.primary_entity: A type of signal used in workflows.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores configuration settings for Service Level Agreements (SLAs).
metadata.primary_entity: A specific configuration of an SLA.

metadata.business_purpose: Tracks the instances of Service Level Agreements (SLAs).
metadata.primary_entity: An instance of an SLA.

metadata.business_purpose: Tracks scheduled actions related to Service Level Agreements (SLA).
metadata.primary_entity: Scheduled action for a SLA.

metadata.business_purpose: Defines the states in a process or workflow, including initial and final states.
metadata.primary_entity: State of a process or workflow.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores embeddings for table names, which can be used for similarity searches and analysis.
metadata.primary_entity: Embedding of a table name.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores configuration and metadata for each tenant.
metadata.primary_entity: Tenant configuration or setting.

metadata.business_purpose: Records financial transactions including status, currency, and whether they require annotation.
metadata.primary_entity: Financial transaction.

metadata.business_purpose: Records the steps or stages in a process, including status and creation details.
metadata.primary_entity: Process transition or stage.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores user information and metadata.
metadata.primary_entity: A user of the system.

metadata.business_purpose: Tracks associations between users and groups they belong to.
metadata.primary_entity: A many-to-many relationship between a user and a group.

metadata.business_purpose: Records permissions granted to users, potentially overridden or not.
metadata.primary_entity: A permission granted or denied to a user.

metadata.business_purpose: Stores individual user profiles containing various settings and preferences.
metadata.primary_entity: User profile

metadata.business_purpose: Records prompts created or updated by users, including their content and status.
metadata.primary_entity: User prompt

metadata.business_purpose: Tracks the roles assigned to each user, linking users to their permissions and responsibilities.
metadata.primary_entity: User role association

metadata.business_purpose: Stores security questions and answers for users to ensure account recovery compliance.
metadata.primary_entity: Security question for a user

metadata.business_purpose: Tracks the permissions granted to each user, ensuring access control and compliance with authorization policies.
metadata.primary_entity: Permission for a user

metadata.business_purpose: Defines the workflows that are used to manage processes, tasks, and business logic across the organization.
metadata.primary_entity: Workflow instance
